description: Inspect and safely operate Audiobookshelf libraries over MCP.
name: io.github.jeeftor/abs-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Base URL of your Audiobookshelf server.
environmentVariables.name: ABS_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Audiobookshelf API key or bearer token.
environmentVariables.name: ABS_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Set to false to enable scan and cleanup tools.
environmentVariables.name: ABS_READ_ONLY

environmentVariables.description: Audiobookshelf request timeout as a Go duration or seconds.
environmentVariables.name: ABS_TIMEOUT

environmentVariables.description: Optional local ABS fixture directory for fixture resources.
environmentVariables.name: ABS_FIXTURE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Optional JSON file containing extra request headers.
environmentVariables.name: ABS_EXTRA_HEADERS_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Optional PEM CA bundle for private or corporate ABS TLS.
environmentVariables.name: ABS_TLS_CA_CERT_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Temporary TLS verification bypass for local troubleshooting.
environmentVariables.name: ABS_TLS_INSECURE_SKIP_VERIFY

environmentVariables.description: MCP transport to run at startup. Use stdio for local launchers or http for Streamable HTTP.
environmentVariables.name: ABS_TRANSPORT

environmentVariables.description: Streamable HTTP endpoint path used when ABS_TRANSPORT=http.
environmentVariables.name: ABS_HTTP_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional bearer token required from Streamable HTTP MCP clients.
environmentVariables.name: ABS_HTTP_BEARER_TOKEN

title: Audiobookshelf MCP
